disclaimer: FIRST evidence-backed prioritization pass — NOT complete/all. Ranks PENDING eligible candidates by unique high-value capability first. The long tail is KEPT VISIBLE (never deleted). Scores are evidence-gated; latency/memory/quality are eval-pending (browser-runtime eval required — protocol in README). downloads/likes are weak context only.

tierMeaning.high: distinct/novel capability + deployable license + browser-feasible — build first.
tierMeaning.medium: incremental capability or unverified feasibility/license — build after high.
tierMeaning.low: redundant/restricted/low-confidence — visible long tail, low marginal value.
tierMeaning.superseded: format-port/quant/distillation of an existing capability — build the canonical instead.
tierMeaning.blocked: gated/restricted — stays counted, not buildable as-is.
